import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/i18n"

## Constants

<a name="DefaultLocale"></a>

```go
const (
    DefaultLocale = "en"
)
```

<a name="MissingKeyFallback"></a>
## func [MissingKeyFallback](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L72>)

```go
func MissingKeyFallback(key Key) string
```

MissingKeyFallback returns deterministic fallback text for missing keys.

<a name="SetGlobalLocale"></a>
## func [SetGlobalLocale](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L77>)

```go
func SetGlobalLocale(locale string)
```

SetGlobalLocale updates the process\-wide locale used by T.

<a name="T"></a>
## func [T](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L84>)

```go
func T(key Key, args ...any) string
```

T resolves a message using the global localizer.

<a name="ConfigProvider"></a>
## type [ConfigProvider](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L13-L15>)

ConfigProvider is the minimal config contract needed to resolve locale.

```go
type ConfigProvider interface {
    GetString(key string) string
}
```

<a name="Key"></a>
## type [Key](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/keys.go#L4>)

Key is a stable translation key.

```go
type Key string
```

<a name="Localizer"></a>
## type [Localizer](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L18-L20>)

Localizer resolves message keys for a locale.

```go
type Localizer struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="New"></a>
### func [New](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L28>)

```go
func New(locale string) *Localizer
```

New creates a localizer for the provided locale with fallback to English.

<a name="NewFromConfig"></a>
### func [NewFromConfig](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L40>)

```go
func NewFromConfig(cfg ConfigProvider) *Localizer
```

NewFromConfig creates a localizer from config key "locale".

<a name="Localizer.Locale"></a>
### func \(\*Localizer\) [Locale](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L48>)

```go
func (l *Localizer) Locale() string
```

Locale returns the effective locale for this localizer.

<a name="Localizer.T"></a>
### func \(\*Localizer\) [T](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/i18n/i18n.go#L56>)

```go
func (l *Localizer) T(key Key, args ...any) string
```

T resolves a translated message key.
